title: Sara reads syrup smudge: G-I-N-G-E-R
negativePrompt: extra people, duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same person, mirrored figure, background extras, second sister, second girl, additional kid
prompt: Close shot of @Sara in @Livingroom standing next to a chocolate-syrup smudge on the wall shaped like letters. @Sara reading slowly, pointing at each letter: "G... I... N... G... E... R. Ginger! Ginger was here!"
